case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. ENGELS D. ABURTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $565.02 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT ABURTO, ENGELS D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
